metadata.name: timbrel
metadata.summary: timbrel is a Django app to provide the basic framework for ecommerce.

functions.name: timbrel.utils.register_viewsets
documentation: Dynamically register all ViewSets in the app's viewsets.py file.

functions.name: timbrel.utils.include_routers
documentation: Dynamically import routers from each installed app.

classes.name: timbrel.permissions.StrictDjangoObjectPermissions
documentation:
Custom permissions class that restricts all access unless the user
explicitly has the necessary permissions.

classes.name: timbrel.permissions.IsOwnerOnly
documentation:
Object-level permission to only allow owners of an object to edit it.
Assumes the model instance has a `user` attribute.

classes.name: timbrel.permissions.IsOwnerOrReadOnly
documentation:
Object-level permission to only allow owners of an object to edit it.
Assumes the model instance has an `owner` attribute.

classes.name: timbrel.permissions.IsNotAuthenticated
documentation: Allows access only to unauthenticated users.

methods.name: timbrel.inlines.FileInline.display_tag
documentation:
This method is used to generate an image preview for the file.
Ensure that the `file` field is an `ImageField` or `FileField`.

methods.name: timbrel.views.UserViewSet.get_permissions
documentation: Override to allow different permissions for register vs other actions.

methods.name: timbrel.views.OrderViewSet.get_permissions
documentation: Override to allow different permissions for register vs other actions.

methods.name: timbrel.serializers.PageSerializer.get_page_sections
documentation: page_images = serializers.SerializerMethodField()

methods.name: timbrel.admin.BaseAdmin.__init__
documentation: Initialize BaseAdmin, dynamically generate inlines based on the model's fields.

methods.name: timbrel.admin.FileAdmin.display_tag
documentation:
This method is used to generate an image preview for the file.
Ensure that the `file` field is an `ImageField` or `FileField`.

classes.name: timbrel.admin.PageAdmin
documentation: class FlatPageAdmin(FlatPageAdmin, ModelAdmin):
fieldsets = [
(None, {"fields": ["url", "title", "content", "sites"]}),
_("Advanced options"),
"classes": ["collapse"],
"fields": [
"enable_comments",
"registration_required",
"template_name",
Re-register FlatPageAdmin

methods.name: timbrel.base.CommonModel.get_slug_source
documentation:
Returns the column from which the slug should be generated.
This can be overridden by a child models as needed.

methods.name: timbrel.base.CommonModel.get_slug_alt_source
documentation:
Returns an alternative column from which the slug should be generated.
This can be overridden by a child models as needed.

methods.name: timbrel.base.CommonModel.exclude_from_representation
documentation:
Returns a list of fields to exclude from the representation.
This can be overridden by a child models as needed.

methods.name: timbrel.base.CommonModel.include_in_representation
documentation:
Returns a list of fields to include in the representation.
This can be overridden by a child models as needed.
